inputs: SRR24043307-2GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz SRR24043307-5GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz SRR24043307-10GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz

metrics.command_line: ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/9/0/9/dataset_909d4336-e777-48a6-9c09-a41023e8a108.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/e/9/2/dataset_e9283763-91f2-4b90-a3db-33f7169549bc.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/galaxy/server/database/objects/_metadata_files/d/b/6/metadata_db67ba48-1be6-4b35-bca4-bb8e11dc2a3d.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
metrics.tool_stdout:
INFO [2026-04-01 02:16:04,795]: Using 2 threads with following basic args: lofreq call --verbose --ref reference.fa --call-indels --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000 --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30 --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0 --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter reads.bam
